title: Stop AI Hallucinations With These 5 Techniques
summary: AWS Developers presents five techniques to reduce AI hallucinations in agents: semantic tool selection to filter context, graph RAG for precise queries, multi-agent validation to catch failures, symbolic guardrails implemented in code, and runtime steering for self-correction. Demonstrates each technique with a travel agent example and shows how Amazon Bedrock AgentCore implements these at scale.
